# ui-motion-workflow

> Open-source UI orchestration workflow for motion-aware frontend work, browser validation, and agent-guided implementation.

`ui-motion-workflow` is a portable workflow layer that helps an AI coding agent move from visual direction to provider choice to implementation to real browser validation.

## Best entry points

- README.md: primary repository overview
- docs/architecture.md: workflow model and phase design
- docs/codex-usage.md: Codex-oriented usage flow
- docs/providers.md: provider positioning and selection rules
- implementations/: environment-specific adapters
- examples/: concrete examples and before/after usage

## Key concepts

- UI orchestration
- frontend motion workflow
- browser validation
- agent-guided UI implementation
- provider selection across react-bits, magicui, and motion-primitives
- discoverability-aware product surfaces across SEO, GEO, GSO, AEO, and ASO contexts

## Ecosystem links

- GitHub organization: https://github.com/seryvon-com
- Related product repository: https://github.com/seryvon-com/seryvon
